title: r3ply site config
description: Used to configure the r3ply commenting system.

version.title: r3ply version
version.description: Declares what version of r3ply this config conforms to.

enabled.title: Enable r3ply
enabled.description: False completely turns off r3ply, including any downstream processes.

site.title: New site configuration
site.description: Declares a new site this config applies to, consisting of domain x r3ply service, and signet. See docs for more info.
